title: quercus chartacea
intro: Quercus chartacea, also known as the "Chinese cork tree," is a species of evergreen oak tree native to southern China. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, including flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its various health benefits. Traditionally, Quercus chartacea has been used to treat fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions, as well as to support cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
